title: Show HN: Rowboat – Open-source, local-first alternative to Claude Desktop
summary: Rowboat 是一个开源、本地优先的 Claude Desktop 替代品，提供邮件、会议、笔记、浏览器和并行编码等工作界面。
translated_summary: Rowboat is an open-source, local-first alternative to Claude Desktop that integrates email, meeting notes, browser, parallel coding, and customizable work surfaces with a knowledge graph.
